summary: Completed frontend-only testing of AdvantEdge360 proposal workflow features, task filtering, and global timer ribbon. All tested features are working correctly.

issues: Actions section empty for non-creators - this is expected behavior but may confuse users who navigate to proposals they didn't create

seed_data_creation: Used existing test user: test-user-iter6-1772017526653 with session: test_session_iter6_1772017526653
context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend features tested and working. Proposal workflow dropdowns show correct actions based on status. Task filtering works correctly. Timer ribbon appears and persists across pages. Dashboard sections conditionally render based on data availability.
